stories.title: Follow live: Colombia-Switzerland goes to penalty ...
Messi saves Argentina in dramatic win over Egypt
stories.summary: Lionel Messi scored in a record sixth straight World Cup knockout match to help Argentina reach the quarterfinals with a stunning late comeback to beat Egypt 3-2 in Atlanta.

stories.title: Egypt bemoan 'injustice' after Argentina defeat
stories.summary: Hossam Hassan said Egypt were the victim of an "injustice" in their 3-2 World Cup defeat against Argentina due to FIFA wanting Lionel Messi to "stay in the running."

stories.title: Djokovic outlasts FAA in 5-hour Wimbledon epic
stories.summary: Novak Djokovic extended his streak of Wimbledon semifinal appearances to a record eight, outlasting No. 3 seed Felix Auger-Aliassime 7-6 (10), 3-6, 6-3, 6-7 (4), 7-6 (4) in a match that lasted 5 hours and 15 minutes.

stories.title: Sources: Lakers still pursuing free agent Kuminga
stories.summary: While the Los Angeles Lakers continue to actively pursue Jonathan Kuminga, they've also agreed to a one-year deal with veteran center Kevon Looney.
